items.name_en: New 💋 This Book Tote handbag is a flagship product embodying the Dior aesthetic, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri. Adorned with a black and gold Butterfly Zodiac pattern embroidery by Pietro Ruffo, with interwoven zodiac symbols and vibrant butterflies, it highlights the zodiac style and can hold various daily essentials. Large size, featuring a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, can be carried by hand.
items.name_cn:

Adorned with a black and gold Butterfly Zodiac pattern embroidery by Pietro Ruffo, with interwoven zodiac symbols and vibrant butterflies, it highlights the zodiac style and can hold various daily essentials. Front featuring Christian Dior Paris logo
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 42 x 35 x 18 cm
8001

items.name_cn:
🆕 22 Handbag
New color small size black gold
 Original box calfskin👍 Fine and glossy leather,
Soft yet durable, possessing both qualities
Simple appearance hiding many designer's high-end designs, hollow Chanel logo coins, small embellishments elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of retro sentiment, a relaxed lazy vibe! 🍃
Dimensions: 35*37*7cm
